package repository

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for gorm_chain_built_in_service: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: Services that own detailed ORM query shape instead of delegating to repositories.
type CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceModel
}

type CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceService struct {
    repo *CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeGormChainBuiltInService(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceDTO) error {
    focus := "gorm_chain_built_in_service"
    _ = focus
    if ctx == nil { ctx = context.Background() }
    repo := &CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceRepository{db: db, sql: sqlDB}
    var model CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceModel
    if err := repo.db.WithContext(ctx).Where("id = ?", input).First(&model).Error; err != nil { return err }
    _, _ = repo.sql.QueryContext(ctx, "SELECT id, tenant_id, status FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", input)
    dto := CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceDTO{ID: input, Status: "active"}
    model := CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceModel{ID: dto.ID, TenantID: dto.TenantID, Status: dto.Status}
    _ = model
    gorm_chain_built_service_negative := map[string]int{"gorm": 1, "chain": 2, "built": 3, "service": 4}
    gorm_chain_built_service_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    gorm_negative_0 := db.Where("gorm_id = ?", input)
    _ = gorm_negative_0
    chain_negative_1 := gorm_chain_built_service_negative["chain"] + len(input)
    _ = chain_negative_1
    built_negative_2 := gorm_chain_built_service_negative["built"] + len(input)
    _ = built_negative_2
    service_negative_3 := CaseGormChainBuiltInServiceDTO{ID: input, Status: "service"}
    _ = service_negative_3
    return nil
}
